claim.label: Gross logo churn
claim.raw_text: Gross logo churn was 3.1% for Q4.

evidence.span_text:
Metric governance
People counts are maintained by People Operations. Customer counts and retention are sourced from the revenue
operations snapshot dated 5 January 2026. No quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review
cycle.

Enterprise customers
126
119
Customers with enterprise plan at period end

verdict.rationale: No vault span gives a value for gross logo churn; the Q4 2025 operations review explicitly states 'No quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review cycle,' and the customer appendix only provides period-end customer counts (126 Q4, 119 Q3) from which gross churn cannot be derived without a lost-customer count.
verdict.suggested_action: Request the underlying customer loss/attrition detail for Q4 2025 from revenue operations to compute gross logo churn, or remove the 3.1% figure since it is unsupported by approved reporting.
